activation_definition: external gas-depletion maturity proxy; not direct A_gov inference
claim_boundary: This is an external diagnostic test, not a validated evolutionary reconstruction, and not a direct rotation-curve test.
falsification_rules: The governor maturity interpretation is challenged if high-maturity proxy systems routinely remain gas-dominated.
The governor maturity interpretation is challenged if low-maturity proxy systems routinely have low gas fractions and high molecular organization.
This M15 test transfers the M9 SPARC-derived threshold surface without re-fitting only as a proxy activation flag.
primary_result: External maturity proxy vs f_gas Spearman=-0.950; vs M_H2/M_HI Spearman=0.373; vs H2 depletion time Spearman=0.290.
warnings: xGASS/xCOLD GASS provide gas and star-formation diagnostics, not resolved rotation curves.
Molecular masses include detections and limits/proxy fills; rows should be audited before manuscript-level numerical claims.
The external_maturity_index is rank-based within this sample and should not be treated as universal.
